📄 Complete Details & Notification

Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE)

CBSE Board Class Xth and Class XIIth Result 2026

CBSE Results 2026 | Short Details of Notification

OnlyJobs® Official WWW.OnlyJobs

Important Dates

  • Class 10th High School Exam Between : 17/02/2026 to 11/03/2026
  • Class 12th Intermediate Exam Between : 17/02/2026 to 10/04/2026
  • Digilocker Account Activate Through Security Pin :14/04/2026
  • Class 10th Result Declared : 15/04/2026
  • Class 12th Result Declared : April / May 2026

Application Fee

  • No Application Fee for the Checking CBSE Board Term II Class X & XII Exam Result & Activate Your DIGI Locker Account Through Security Pin.
 

OnlyJobs® :  How to Activate DIGILOCKER Account Through School Security Pin 2026

  • CBSE has issued a notice on 14 April 2026, in which it has been said that the annual board examination year 2026 of class 10 and 12 results / certificates and migration will be through Digilocker.
  • All CBSE Board Class 10 and 12 students who have also appeared in the exam will have to create their own account in Digilocker.
  • CBSE Board students can create their account in Digilocker by following some simple steps - which CBSE has also mentioned in its notice.
  • Once the account is created in Digilocker, candidates can also download their CBSE Board 2026 result, marksheet, certificate and migration online after the issue.
  • Step by Step to Activate CBSE Student to Activate Digilocker Account.
  • Step 1 : The student will get the link to do DigiLocker Account Confirmation in the Some Useful Important Links section at the bottom of this page.
  • Step 2 :To confirm DigiLocker Account, the student has to first select his class such as X or XII.
  • Step 3 : After that the student has to enter the code of his school. If the school code is not known, then they can see it in their admit card.
  • Step 4 : After that the student has to enter his/her board exam roll number.
  • Step 5 : After that Enter 6 Digit PIN provided by your school.
  • Step 6 : After that the candidate has to enter his mobile number.
  • Step 7 : An OTP will be received on the mobile number given by the student, he will have to enter it.
  • Step 8 : DigiLocker Account Confirmation process will be completed.
  • Now waiting for the candidate, whenever the CBSE Board will release the result of 2026 examination, candidates can also check their result through Digilocker as well as download the passing certificate / mark sheet and migration.

How to Check CBSE Board 10th & 12th Results 2026

  • CBSE Board Exam 2026 result can be released anytime in the month of April / May 2026.
  • After the release of CBSE result of board exam, candidates can check their result through two means.
  • After the release of CBSE result, candidates can check their class 10 and 12 result through CBSEResult and Digilocker whose direct link will be found in OnlyJobs Some Useful Important Link of this page.
  • The student must have his/her roll number to view the CBSE Result 2026.
  • All the registered students of CBSE Exam 2026 must activate their Digilocker account.

MPBSE MP Board Class 10th HSC & 12th HSSC Result 2026

MP Board Results 2026 : Short Details of Notification

OnlyJobs® Official WWW.OnlyJobs

Important Dates

  • Class 10th HSC Result Available : 15/04/2026
  • Class 12th HSSC Result Available :15/04/2026
  • MPBSE 10th & 12th Result Time :11 AM

Exam Conducted By

  • Board of Secondary Education, Madhya Pradesh, MPBSE Bhopal Are Conducted the High School Class 10th HSC & Intermediate Class 12th HSSC Examination 2026.

OnlyJobs® : How to Check MP Board 10th & 12th Result 2026

  • In this year 2026 around 16 Lakhs + are registered in MP Board 10th High School Class 10 Exam & 12th Intermediate Examination 2026.
  • This year Madhya Pradesh Board Class 10th Exam was held from 13 February 2026 to 06 March 2026
  • This year Madhya Pradesh Board Class 12th Exam was held from 10 February 2026 to 07 March 2026
  • This year the result of MP Board High School Class 10 & Class 12 examination will be released 15 April 2026 at 11 AM.
  • What documents / details will be required to check the result of MP Board class 10 exam & 12th Exam  this year.
  • To check the mp result of Annual Board Examination 2026, the candidate will need the roll number.
  • Candidates who do not have roll number available or not known can check it in their admit card or can check from their school/college/board.
  • MP Board Class 10 HSC & 12th HSSC Result of all stream Result will be released 15/04/2026 together.
  • Candidates can also check their subject wise result of the exam.
  • Stream Wise Toppers information will also be released by the MPBSE Results 2026.

Are you waiting for OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Result 2026? Great news! The Odisha Public Service Commission has officially published the result for Assistant Executive Engineer posts today (18th April 2026). Thousands of candidates who appeared in the examination can now verify their qualifying status online.

This article provides complete information about OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Result 2026 including direct download links, merit list, expected cutoff marks, scorecard details, and step-by-step instructions to check results.

Recruiting Body Odisha Public Service Commission
Post Name Assistant Executive Engineer
Result Type Written Examination Result
Result Declaration Date 18th April 2026

Check Your Result Now

Download OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Result 2026

Direct official link - No login required for merit list

How to Check OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Result 2026?

Candidates can download their OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Result 2026 scorecard by following this simple process:

  1. Visit the official website: opsc.gov.in
  2. Click on the "Results" or "What's New" section
  3. Find the link for "Assistant Executive Engineer Result 2026"
  4. Enter your Roll Number and Date of Birth (if required) or directly open the PDF merit list
  5. Search for your roll number in the list
  6. Download and save the scorecard/PDF for future reference

OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Merit List 2026 - What's Inside?

The OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer merit list 2026 is a comprehensive document containing details of all qualified candidates. OPSC prepares separate merit lists for different categories.

Merit List Contains:

  • Roll Number of qualified candidates
  • Candidate Name (as per application)
  • Father's/Mother's Name
  • Category (Gen/OBC/SC/ST/EWS)
  • Total Marks Obtained
  • Final Rank in merit
  • Qualifying Status (Qualified/Not Qualified)

Types of Merit Lists Released:

  1. General Merit List: Overall toppers regardless of category
  2. Category-Wise Merit List: Separate lists for OBC, SC, ST, EWS, Women, etc.
  3. Waiting List: Candidates on waitlist if selected candidates withdraw

OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer Scorecard 2026 - Information Breakdown

Your OPSC Assistant Executive Engineer scorecard 2026 will display the following information:

Candidate Name As mentioned in application form
Roll Number Unique identification number
Exam Date EXAM DATE
Subject-Wise Marks Individual subject scores (if applicable)
Total Marks Obtained Out of maximum marks
Qualifying Status Qualified/Not Qualified
Category Rank Your position in category merit

Important Instructions for Qualified Candidates

  • ✓ Download and save your scorecard immediately
  • ✓ Take 3-4 printouts for future reference
  • ✓ Keep checking official website for Interview/PET call letter
  • ✓ Start preparing for next stages (Document Verification/Interview)
  • ✓ Keep all original documents ready
  • ✓ Verify personal details on scorecard - report discrepancies immediately
  • ✓ Register mobile number on official portal for SMS alerts

Candidates who appeared in the PST/PET and DV/DME/RME stages can now download their SSC GD final scorecard 2025 using their registration number and password. The scorecard displays normalized CBT marks and overall qualifying status after all recruitment stages. The download window is limited - typically a short period - so act quickly before the link deactivates.

Key Highlights:

  • Release Date: February 17, 2026
  • Last Date to Download: March 1, 2026 (till 6:00 PM)
  • Access: Online only via ssc.gov.in login
  • Purpose: View final marks, compare with cut-offs, and save for records/joining

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Overview

Particular Details
Exam Name Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA, Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles, and Sepoy in NCB Examination 2025
Conducting Body Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
Final Result Status Declared on January 15, 2026
Scorecard Status Released on February 17, 2026
Mode of Scorecard Online only
Login Credentials Registration number / Username and Password (plus captcha if required)
Official Website ssc.gov.in

Visit the Staff Selection Commission (SSC) official website – ssc.gov.in

Important Dates: SSC GD Final Result and Scorecard 2025

Event Date/Details
CBT Exam Dates February 4 to 25, 2025
PET/PST and Medical Stages Conducted post-CBT shortlisting
Final Result Declaration January 15, 2026
Final Scorecard Release February 17, 2026
Last Date to Download Scorecard March 1, 2026 (6:00 PM)

Direct Link to Check SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Candidates can access the SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 through the direct link on the SSC portal under the “Result/Marks” section after logging in. The portal may redirect from legacy links, but use ssc.gov.in primarily.

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 – Direct Link (Active)
(Login required at ssc.gov.in for marks download)

Step-by-Step Guide to Download SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  1. Visit the official Staff Selection Commission website: ssc.gov.in.
  2. Click on the “Login” or “Candidate Login” button on the homepage.
  3. Enter your registration number/username, password, and captcha (if prompted).
  4. After logging in, navigate to the “Result/Marks” tab on your dashboard.
  5. Select “Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA and Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles Examination 2025” from the list.
  6. Click on the “SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025” or “Marks” link to view your details.
  7. Your final scorecard will display on screen - review marks, cut-off comparison, and status.
  8. Download the PDF and print it for future reference (e.g., document verification). Save it promptly, as access ends after the deadline.
  9. (Use the direct link mentioned above to reach the login faster if available.)

Details Mentioned on SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Your scorecard typically includes:

  • Candidate’s name, roll number, registration number
  • Category/sub-category (UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, etc.)
  • Exam name and applied post
  • Section-wise marks (General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge & General Awareness, Elementary Mathematics, English/Hindi)
  • Raw and normalized marks
  • Total marks in CBT (considered for final merit after qualifying PET/PST and medical)
  • Qualifying status (selected/not selected) and any remarks
  • Note on limited availability window

SSC GD Final Cut Off and Merit List 2025

The SSC GD final cut off 2025 was released with the final result on January 15, 2026, and is force-wise, state-wise, category-wise, and gender-wise. It appears in the official result PDF write-up.

Your scorecard marks should be compared to the relevant cut-off for your category/force/state to assess selection. The merit list PDF lists roll numbers of provisionally selected candidates (around 50,047 selected against vacancies), while the scorecard provides individual marks for those who reached physical/medical stages.

(Refer to the official SSC result PDFs for exact cut-off tables - examples range from ~104 to 152+ depending on category/force.)

What to Do After Downloading SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Selected candidates: Keep multiple printouts/PDFs of the scorecard and final result for document verification, joining, and force allocation.

Verify details (name, roll number, category, etc.) - report serious discrepancies to SSC regional offices promptly.

Non-selected candidates: Use marks for performance analysis and preparation for future SSC exams.

Download and save copies early - the window closes after the last date.

SSC GD Selection Process 2025 (Short Overview)

The process included:

  • Computer-Based Test (CBT): Four sections totaling 160 marks.
  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Physical Standard Test (PST): Qualifying.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME)/Review Medical Examination (RME): Qualifying.
  • Final merit based on normalized CBT marks (for qualified candidates), followed by force/state allocation per vacancies and preferences.

The final scorecard reflects CBT performance post-qualifying stages, available briefly post-result.

Important Links for SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  • SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Download: ssc.gov.in (login to Result/Marks)
  • SSC GD Final Result 2025 Merit List PDF: Available on ssc.gov.in under Results
  • SSC GD Final Cut Off 2025 PDF: In final result write-up on ssc.gov.in
  • SSC Official Website: ssc.gov.in

Check selected candidates details, state-wise merit, and next steps below.

Are you waiting for Bank of Maharashtra Apprentices Result 2026? Great news! Bank of Maharashtra has officially published the provisional allotment list for Apprentice posts today (12th March 2026). Candidates who applied for the 600 vacancies (application window: 15th to 25th January 2026) can now verify their selection status online based on merit from 12th/10+2 marks.

This article provides complete information about Bank of Maharashtra Apprentices Provisional Allotment List 2026 including direct download links, merit details, and step-by-step instructions to check status.

How to Check Bank of Maharashtra Apprentices Provisional Allotment List 2026?

Candidates can download and check their status by following this simple process:

  2. Go to the 'Careers' or 'Recruitment' section

  4. Click on the PDF link (dated 12th March 2026)

Bank of Maharashtra Apprentices Merit List 2026 - What's Inside?

The Bank of Maharashtra Apprentices provisional allotment list 2026 is prepared state-wise in descending order based on marks/percentage in 12th (HSC/10+2) or Diploma examination. Ties are resolved by age (older candidates preferred).

Quick Summary: Central Bank of India has released the list of shortlisted candidates for Faculty post at RSETI Coochbehar on 11 March 2026. The PDF is available on the official website centralbank.bank.in. Candidates can download the list to check if shortlisted for interview scheduled on 17 March 2026. This is for contractual Faculty engagement at Rural Self Employment Training Institute (RSETI). Verify your status and prepare for interview below.

Are you waiting for Central Bank of India Faculty Shortlisted List 2026? Important update! Central Bank of India (Regional Office: Cooch Behar) has officially published the list of provisionally shortlisted candidates for the post of Faculty to be posted at RSETI Coochbehar. The list was uploaded on 11 March 2026 for candidates who applied for this contractual position.

This article provides complete information about Central Bank of India Faculty Shortlisted Candidates List 2026 including direct download link, interview details, what's in the list, and step-by-step instructions to check your status.

How to Check Central Bank of India Faculty Shortlisted List 2026?

Candidates can verify if their name appears in the Central Bank of India Faculty Shortlisted List 2026 by following these simple steps:

  1. Visit the official website: centralbank.bank.in
  2. Navigate to the "Recruitments" section under Human Capital Management or Latest Notifications.
  3. Look for "List of Shortlisted Candidates For Interview for the post of Faculty to be posted at RSETI Coochbehar" dated around 11 March 2026.
  4. Click on the PDF link to download and open it.
  5. Use Ctrl+F to search your name, application number, or other details in the list.
  6. If shortlisted, note the interview date (17 March 2026), venue, and reporting time/instructions mentioned in the notice.
  7. Prepare required documents for verification during interview.

Central Bank of India Faculty Shortlisted List 2026 - What's Inside?

The Central Bank of India Faculty Shortlisted List 2026 contains the names of provisionally shortlisted applicants for Faculty position at RSETI Coochbehar after scrutiny of applications.

Shortlisted List Contains:

  • Name of the Shortlisted Candidate
  • Father's Name (if mentioned)
  • Application/Reference Details
  • Interview Date & Venue: 17 March 2026 at specified location
  • Instructions for Interview
  • Possibly Category or Other Relevant Info

Note: This is a provisional shortlist for interview. Final selection depends on performance in personal interview and document verification.

Central Bank of India Faculty 2026 - Key Information Breakdown

Faculty positions at RSETIs are contractual engagements for training rural youth in self-employment skills. Typical requirements include:

Qualification Graduate/Post Graduate (preference for MSW/MA in RD/Psychology/Sociology, B.Ed., teaching experience)
Age Limit Usually 22-40/45 years (relaxation applicable)
Consolidated Remuneration Approx. ₹30,000 per month (varies by notification)
Application Mode Offline (as per regional notification)
Next Step Attend Interview on 17 March 2026

Important Instructions for Shortlisted Candidates

  • ✓ Download and print the shortlisted PDF immediately
  • ✓ Carry original documents, application copy, ID proofs, and testimonials to interview
  • ✓ Reach the venue on time on 17 March 2026
  • ✓ Prepare for questions on rural development, training skills, and relevant experience
  • ✓ Keep checking official website for any changes or additional notices
  • ✓ If not shortlisted, look for other RSETI/FLC vacancies on the site
  • ✓ Report any issues to the Regional Office, Cooch Behar

NTA National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test (NEET UG 2026)

NTA NEET UG Exam 2026: Short Details of Notification

WWW.OnlyJobs

Important Dates

  • Application Begin : 08/02/2026
  • Last Date for Apply Online : 11/03/2026 upto 09 PM
  • Last Date Online Payment :11/03/2026
  • Correction Date : 12-14 March 2026
  • NEET UG 2025 Exam Date : 03/05/2026 (Sunday)
  • Exam City Available :13/04/2026
  • Admit Card Available :Before Exam
  • Result Declared :June 2026

Application Fee

  • General : 1700/-
  • EWS / OBC : 1600/-
  • SC / ST / PH : 1000/-
  • Out Side India : 9500/-
  • Pay the Examination Fee Through E Challan Offline Mode or Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card or Net Banking Fee Mode

NEET UG Eligibility 2026

  • Passed 10+2 Intermediate Exam with Physics, Chemistry, Biology PCB Group of Subjects in Any Recognized Board in India.
  • For More Details Kindly See the Full Information Brochure or Read the Code Wise Eligibility Details.

NEET UG 2026 Age Limit

  • Minimum Age : 17 Years
  • Maximum Age : No Limit
  • born on or before 31.12.2009
  • Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
 

Eligibility Code for NTA NEET 2026 UG

  • NEET UG Code 01: A candidate who is appearing in the qualifying examination, i.e., 12 Standard in 2025 whose result is awaited may apply and take up the said test but he/she shall not be eligible for admission to the MBBS or BDS, if he/she does not pass the qualifying examination with the required pass percentage of marks at the time of first round of Counseling.
  • NEET UG Code 02 : The Higher/Senior Secondary Examination or the Indian School Certificate Examination which is equivalent to 10+2 Higher/Senior Secondary Examination after a period of 12 years study, the last two years of such study comprising of Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Bio-technology (which shall include practical tests in these subjects) and Mathematics or any other elective subject with English at a level not less than the core course for English as prescribed by the National Council of Educational Research and Training after introduction of the 10+2+3 educational structure as recommended by the National Committee on Education.
  • NEET UG Code 03 : The Intermediate/Pre-degree Examination in Science of an Indian University/Board or other recognized examining body with Physics, Chemistry, Biology /Bio-technology (which shall include practical test in these subjects) and also English as a compulsory subject
  • NEET UG Code 04 : The Pre-professional/Pre-medical Examination with Physics ,Chemistry, Biology/Bio-technology & English after passing either the Higher Secondary Examination or the Pre-University or an equivalent examination. The Pre-professional/Pre-medical examination shall include practical test in these subjects and also English as a compulsory subject.
  • NEET UG Code 05 : The first year of the three years’ degree course of a recognized University with Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Bio-technology including practical tests in these subjects provided the examination is a University Examination and candidate has passed the earlier qualifying examination with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Bio-Technology with English at a level not less than a core course.
  • NEET UG Code 06 : B.Sc.Examination of an Indian University provided that he/she has passed the B.Sc.Examination with not less than two of the subjects Physics, Chemistry, Biology (Botany, Zoology)/Bio-technology and further that he/she has passed the earlier qualifying examination with Physics,Chemistry,Biology and English.
  • NEET UG Code 07: Any other examination which in scope and standard (Last 02 years of 10+2 Study
    comprising of Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Biotechnology; which shall include
    practical test in these subjects) is found to be equivalent to the Intermediate Science
    Examination of an Indian University/Board, taking Physics, Chemistry and
    Biology/Biotechnology including practical tests in each of these subjects and English.

Important Instruction for NEET UG

  • Aadhar Card is Compulsory in All India NTA NEET 2026 Examination
  • Instruction Of Photo  : Candidate Live Photo & Clear Passport Size and 4x6 Size Photo  (Visible Including Ears) with White
  • Background  and Also Enter Your Candidates Name and Photo Taken Date after 01/01/2026
  • For More Details Kindly  SEE NEET UG 2026 Notification

How to Download UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026?

Follow these simple steps to download your UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026:

  1. Step 1: Visit the official UPPSC website at uppsc.up.nic.in or click the direct download link provided above
  2. Step 2: Navigate to the "Admit Card" or "Candidate Dashboard" section on the homepage
  3. Step 3: Click on "UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026" link (for Advt. No. A-5/E-1/2025)

  5. Step 5: Click on "Submit" or "Download Admit Card" button (OTP verification may be required on registered mobile/email)

  8. Step 8: Take 2-3 printouts for exam day (keep backup copies)

Details on UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026

Your UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026 will contain the following information:

Candidate Information:

  • Candidate Name
  • Father's Name
  • Date of Birth
  • Category (General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS)
  • Gender
  • Application/Roll Number
  • Candidate's Photograph and Signature

Exam Information:

  • Exam Name: Assistant Teacher (Trained Graduate Grade) Written Test
  • Exam Date and Shift/Timing
  • Reporting Time
  • Exam Center Name and Complete Address
  • Exam Center Code

Important Instructions:

  • Documents to carry on exam day
  • Items allowed and not allowed in examination hall
  • Exam day instructions and rules

Documents Required on UPPSC Assistant Teacher Exam Day

Mandatory Documents (Originals):

  • UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026 (printed copy with clear photograph)
  • Valid Photo ID Proof (any one of the following):
    • Aadhaar Card
    • Voter ID Card
    • Driving License
    • PAN Card
    • Passport
  • Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies - same as uploaded in application)
  • Simple pen (blue/black ballpoint)

Optional but Recommended:

  • Pencil and eraser (for rough work)
  • Water bottle (transparent, without label)
  • Hand sanitizer (small bottle)

Not Allowed in Examination Hall:

  • Mobile phones and smartphones
  • Smartwatches and digital watches
  • Calculators and electronic devices
  • Books, notes, and study materials
  • Bags and pouches
  • Bluetooth devices and earphones

Important Instructions for UPPSC Assistant Teacher Exam 2026

Before Exam Day:

  • Download admit card 2-3 days before exam date
  • Check exam center location on Google Maps
  • Plan your route and transportation
  • Arrange all required documents in advance
  • Keep backup copies of admit card
  • Read exam instructions carefully

On Exam Day:

  • Reach exam center 45-60 minutes before reporting time
  • Entry closes 30 minutes before exam starts (No late entry allowed)
  • Follow dress code if specified in admit card
  • Carry water and light snacks for outside exam hall
  • Keep calm and focused

During Exam:

  • Follow all invigilator instructions carefully
  • Fill OMR sheet with black/blue ballpoint pen only
  • Manage your time wisely for all sections
  • Don't panic if questions seem difficult
  • Review answers if time permits
  • Don't carry prohibited items inside exam hall

What If UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card Not Available?

If you're unable to download your UPPSC Assistant Teacher Admit Card 2026, try these solutions:

  1. Solution 1: Clear browser cache and cookies, then try again with a fresh session
  2. Solution 2: Try different web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Microsoft Edge, Safari)
  3. Solution 3: Check your application status on the official website to verify if your application was accepted
  4. Solution 4: Contact UPPSC helpdesk immediately

Important: Act immediately if facing issues downloading admit card. Don't wait until exam day. Contact UPPSC helpdesk at least 2 days before the exam.

Documents Required on RBI Assistant Prelims Exam Day

Not Allowed in Examination Hall:

Note: Carrying prohibited items may lead to disqualification. Ration Card and Learner’s Driving License are not valid ID proofs.

Important Instructions for RBI Assistant Prelims Exam 2026

Before Exam Day:

  • Download admit card immediately and take multiple printouts
  • Verify exam center location and plan your travel
  • Check all details on the admit card for any errors
  • Read the Information Handout carefully

On Exam Day:

  • Reach exam center at least 45-60 minutes before reporting time
  • Entry will close as per gate closing time mentioned on admit card
  • Carry only allowed items; no safekeeping facility for prohibited items
  • Follow all COVID or other guidelines if mentioned

During Exam:

  • Negative marking of 0.25 for each wrong answer
  • Follow invigilator instructions strictly
  • Manage time for all sections
  • Do not carry any electronic devices inside the hall

What If RBI Assistant Prelims Admit Card Not Available?

If you’re unable to download your RBI Assistant Prelims Admit Card 2026, try these solutions:

  1. Solution 1: Clear browser cache and cookies, try in incognito mode
  2. Solution 2: Use a different browser (Chrome recommended)
  3. Solution 3: Check your registration details and ensure application was successful
  4. Solution 4: Contact RBI helpdesk or IBPS grievance portal immediately

Important: Resolve any download issues well before the exam date. Keep checking the official website for updates.

SSC OTR 2025 | Short Details of Notification

WWW.OnlyJobs

Important Dates

  • Aadhar Enable OTR Application Begin : 02/06/2025
  • Last Date for Registration : NA

Application Fee

  • General / OBC / EWS : 0/-
  • SC / ST : 0/-
  • No Application Fees

SSC OTR Eligibility

  • One time registration is necessary only for those who want to appear in any SSC recruitment in future. With the help of this registration, the candidate will save a lot of time while applying.
  • No Age Limit in SSC OTR Registration.

SSC Popular Vacancy 

  • SSC Combined Graduate Level CGL Exam
  • SSC Multi Tasking Staff MTS Exam
  • SSC Selection Post Exam
  • SSC Constable GD Recruitment Exam
  • SSC Delhi Police Constable Recruitment Exam
  • SSC Delhi Police Sub Inspector Exam
  • SSC CPO SI Recruitment Exam
  • SSC CHSL 10+2 Recruitment Exam
  • SSC Stenographer Exam
  • SSC Junior Engineer JE Exam
  • SSC Junior Hindi Translator JHT Exam

How to Apply SSC One Time Registration OTR Online Form 2025

  • Staff Selection Commission SSC issued a notice on 22 February 2024 saying that they have launched a new website SSC Gov in, in which all the candidates will have to do fresh one time registration (OTR)
  • Step 1 : Open the Website ssc.gov.in or Direct Link Will be in this Page Some Useful Important Links Section
  • Step 2 : Click on New Registration Tab
  • Step 3 : Students will have to give their basic information such as: Name, Father's Name, Mother's Name, Mobile Number, Email Id and High School Class 10 Roll Number.
  • Step 4 : Verify Your OTR Profile Details & Submit Registration.
  • Step 5 : An OTP will be received on the registered email and registered mobile number of the candidate, he will have to enter it.
  • Step 6 : The registration Part I process will be completed, the candidate will see the OTR Registration No. on the screen.
  • Step 7 : In the next step, you will have to change the default password which has been received on your email, after that you will have to login by writing the registration number along with the password which has been received on the email.
  • Step 9 : Candidates should change the default password of OTR registration number with their custom password. Use capital letters, small letters, numbers and special characters while creating the new password which should be at least 08 digits. Additionally, two security questions will also have to be selected, so that if you forget your password in future, you can recover your password with the help of the security question.
  • Step 10 :  After changing the password, the candidate will have to login again, after that the information about his nationality, category, Visible Identification Mark and information about permanent and local address will be entered in the form.
  • Step 11 : The last step is that here you have to first double check all the information by clicking on the preview button of OTR, after checking, if there is any error then correct it, otherwise click on the declare button and submit the form finally.
  • Step 12 : The registration process of SSC OTR has now been completed, the candidate will be able to see the dashboard whenever any new recruitment comes, or the candidate can also get the information about admit card and result by logging into the SSC dashboard.
  • Our team has also shown a video on how to do SSC one time registration, which you can watch and do your new registration by following the step by step process: SSC OTR Registration Kaise Kare Video Dekhe
  • For more information, you have to complete the notice issued to SSC OTR.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) 

Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET 2026) Primary and Junior Level

UPTET 2026 Advt No 01/UPTET/2026 | Short Details of Notification

WWW.OnlyJobs

Important Dates

  • Application Begin : 27/03/2026
  • Last Date for Registration : 26/04/2026
  • Pay Exam Fee Last Date :26/04/2026 
  • Last Date Correction :01/05/2026
  • Exam Date :02-04 July 2026
  • Exam City Available :22/06/2026
  • Admit Card Available :30/06/2026
  • Answer Key Available : As per Schedule
  • Result Declared :As per Schedule

Application Fee

  • General / OBC / EWS: 1000/-
  • SC / ST : 500/-
  • PH (Divyang) : 300/-
  • Pay the Examination Fee Through SBI I Collect Fee Mode Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Exam Through SBI E Challan Fee Mode, Submit Fee Any Branches of SBI

UPTET 2021 Primary I to V & Junior VI to VIII Eligibility

UPTET Languages Available: Hindi, English, Urdu, Sanskrit

 

 UPTET Primary Level Eligibility

 
  • Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with Passed / Appeared DELED (Final Year) Exam OR
  • Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 50% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) OR
  • Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR
  • 10+2 Intermediate 50% Marks with 4 Year B.ElEd  OR
  • More Details Read Notification.

 

UPTET Junior Level Eligibility

  • Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with 50% Marks with B.Ed / B.Ed Special Exam Passed / Appearing (Final Year) OR
  • Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with BTC Training 2 Year Exam Passed OR
  • 10+2 Intermediate Exam with 50% Marks and B.LEd 4 Year Course OR
  • 10+2 Inter Exam with 50% Marks and B.SC Ed Exam Passed
  • Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR
  • More Details Read Notification.

OnlyJobs® : How to Fill UPTET 2026 Online Form

  • Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC), Prayagraj Are Released Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET Examination 2026. Candidate Can Apply Between 27/03/2026 to 26/04/2026.
  • Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPTET Primary and Junior Level 2026.
  • Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
  • Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
  • Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
  • If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
  • Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
  • For the latest updates on OnlyJobs, admit card, answer key, and result, always visit OnlyJobs, the official website for OnlyJobs in India (Since 2012).

The latest Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Entry Level Profiles! Published at bharatpetroleum.in, this new recruitment drive offers multiple openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the prescribed age limit and possessing the required educational qualification along with minimum post-qualification relevant work-experience can apply online from 18-04-2026 to 17-05-2026. Find all details about the BPCL Entry Level new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL) has released the advertisement for recruitment to various Entry Level Profiles (Junior Executive, Associate Executive & Secretary) on regular basis. Candidates can download the official notification from the BPCL website and check profile-wise vacancies, eligibility, fee and application process before applying online.

  • Download BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026 Overview

Company Name Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL)
Reference No. Recruitment – Entry Level Profiles
Post Name Junior Executive (Engineering / Accounts / Wayside Amenities), Secretary BPCL, Associate Executive (Quality Assurance / Official Language Implementation)
Total Vacancies 250 Posts 
Qualification Diploma, B. Com / BBA / B.Sc / BMS / BHM, M. Sc, Masters in Hindi, Inter CA / Inter CMA + Graduation
Application Mode Online only.
Start Date for Apply Online  18 April 2026
Last Date for Apply Online  17 May 2026 (23:59 hrs)
Official Website https://www.bharatpetroleum.in

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Commencement of Online Application 18 April 2026
Last Date of Online Application 17 May 2026 (23:59 hrs)

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Vacancy 2026

Indicative vacancies have been announced profile-wise. The number of vacancies is indicative and may vary based on actual requirements at the sole discretion of the Corporation.

Profile #Indicative Vacancies
Junior Executive (Engineering) 175
Junior Executive (Accounts) 25
Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities) 10
Secretary BPCL 08
Associate Executive (Quality Assurance) 30
Associate Executive (Official Language Implementation) 02
Total  250 

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Eligibility Criteria 2026

Candidates must fulfil the essential educational qualification and minimum work-experience as on 01.04.2026.

Junior Executive (Engineering)

  • Essential Educational Qualification: Diploma in Engineering (3-year course) in Mechanical / Electrical / Instrumentation / Electronics / Civil / Chemical Engineering from a recognized University with minimum 55% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
  • Essential Work-Experience: Minimum 5 years of continuous post-qualification relevant work-experience (including minimum 1 year in managerial/supervisory role) in specified sectors (POL Terminal/Depot, LPG Bottling Plant, Pipeline, Refinery, Petrochemical, etc.).

Junior Executive (Accounts)

  • Essential Educational Qualification: Graduate in any discipline with minimum 55% + Inter CA / Inter CMA.
  • Essential Work-Experience: Minimum 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience in finance function.

Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities)

  • Essential Educational Qualification: B. Com / BBA / B.Sc / BMS / BHM with minimum 55% (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
  • Essential Work-Experience: Minimum 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience (at least 3 years in Facility Management / QSR / Retail / Hospitality etc.).

Secretary BPCL

  • Essential Educational Qualifications: Class X + Class XII + Bachelor's Degree (3-year course) with minimum 55% in each (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
  • Essential Work-Experience: Minimum 5 years as Secretarial Assistant / Secretary or similar roles.

Associate Executive (Quality Assurance)

  • Essential Educational Qualification: M. Sc (Chemistry) with specialization in specified branches with minimum 60% (relaxed to 55% for SC/ST/PwBD).
  • Essential Work-Experience: Minimum 3 years post-qualification relevant work-experience in laboratory in Petroleum / Oil & Gas / Petro-Chemical / Chemical industry.

Associate Executive (Official Language Implementation)

  • Essential Educational Qualification: Master's in Hindi (2-year course) with minimum 55% (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) + English studied in Class XII / Graduation with minimum 55%.
  • Essential Work-Experience: Minimum 3 years post-qualification work experience in translation (English ↔ Hindi).

Common Note for All Profiles

  • Only Indian Nationals are eligible.

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Application Fee 2026

Age relaxations as per Presidential Directives for OBC-NCL / SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen (cumulative maximum 10 years).

Profile Upper Age Limit (as on 01.04.2026)
Junior Executive (Engineering) 32 years
Junior Executive (Accounts) 35 years (Min. Age- 30 years)
Junior Executive (Wayside Amenities) 32 years
Secretary BPCL 32 years
Associate Executive (Quality Assurance) 35 years
Associate Executive (Official Language Implementation) 35 years

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Application Fee 2026

  • For UR / OBC-NCL / EWS: ₹1180/- (₹1000 + 18% GST + payment gateway charges if any)
  • For SC / ST / PwBD: Exempted from payment of application fee

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Selection Process 2026

  • Multi-stage selection process may comprise Application Screening, Written / Computer Based Test, Case Based Discussion, Group Task, Personal Interview etc.
  • Provisional selection based on Relevant work-experience, Significant on-the-job achievements, Performance in various selection processes.
  • Final appointment subject to successful completion of Pre-Employment Medical Examination.

How to Apply for BPCL Recruitment 2026

  • Candidates must apply online only through the BPCL website (Job Openings section).
  • Register, complete One-Time Registration, fill the application form, upload required documents and pay the fee (if applicable).
  • Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date to avoid last-minute rush.
  • Last date for submission of online application is 17 May 2026 (23:59 hrs).

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Online Application Form

Eligible candidates who wish to apply for the BPCL Entry Level Profiles can do so by submitting their application form online through the official BPCL website. The application process for the BPCL Recruitment 2026 is completely online, and candidates must ensure that they complete all steps before the deadline.

The online application process for the BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026 is available through the BPCL portal. Eligible candidates are encouraged to fill out the application form and submit the required documents before the last date.

Click Here to Apply Online for BPCL Entry Level Profiles Recruitment 2026

BPCL Entry Level Profiles Remuneration 2026

Designation Pay Scale* Approx. CTC at the minimum of Pay Scale
Junior Executive & Secretary Post 30,000-1,20,000 ₹12.28 Lakhs per annum
Associate Executive 40,000-1,40,000 ₹17.11 Lakhs per annum

Candidates will be inducted at the minimum of the pay scale. In addition to Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance (IDA pattern), HRA (if applicable), Perks & Allowances, Retirement Benefits and Performance Related Pay will be payable as per Corporation’s policy.

Important Instructions for Candidates

  • Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply.
  • The cutoff date for age, qualification, and experience is 01 April 2026.
  • All qualifications must be from AICTE/UGC recognized institutions.
  • Marks should be calculated on total aggregate; no rounding off allowed.
  • CGPA must be converted into percentage as per university norms.
  • Only post-qualification experience will be considered.
  • Internship/training during studies will not be counted.
  • Candidates must fill the application form carefully; details once submitted are final.
  • No changes will be allowed after final submission.
  • Submit only one application; latest application will be considered if multiple are submitted.
  • Candidates working in Govt/PSU must produce NOC during selection.
  • Shortlisting is provisional and subject to document verification.
  • Ineligible candidates at any stage will be disqualified.
  • All communication will be done via registered email only.
  • Selection process participation does not guarantee final selection.
  • Updates/corrigendum will be available only on the official website.
  • Travel Allowance (TA) will be provided as per rules for eligible candidates.
  • BPCL reserves the right to cancel/modify recruitment or change vacancies.
  • Providing false information will lead to disqualification.
  • Canvassing or external influence will result in rejection.
  • Apply only through the official portal; beware of fraudulent agents.
  • Any dispute will be subject to Mumbai jurisdiction.

Other Terms and Conditions

How to Apply for CSC e‑Governance Services Indian Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026

Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online only through the official CSC e‑Governance Services Indian website. Follow the steps given below to submit your application form.

Visit Official Website

  • Go to the official CSC e‑Governance Services Indian website: csc.gov.in.

  • On the homepage, navigate to the Recruitment/Careers/Latest Opening section.

Open Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Application Link

  • Find and click on the notification/link titled “CSC e‑Governance Services Indian Aadhaar Supervisor/ Operator Recruitment 2026” or similar.

  • Click on the Apply Online button to proceed to the application page.

Registration (New Users)

  • Click on New Registration (if applying for the first time).

  • Enter basic details such as Name, Mobile Number, Email ID, Date of Birth, and create a password.

  • Submit the details to generate your Registration ID and Password (note these for future login).

Login and Fill Application Form

  • Login using your Registration ID and Password.

  • Fill in the online application form carefully with personal details, contact details, educational qualification, Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator certificate details, and preferred state/district.

  • Ensure that all details match your certificates and Aadhaar data.

Upload Documents

  • Upload scanned copies of the following documents in the prescribed format and size (as mentioned in the notification):

    • Recent passport size photograph

    • Signature

    • 10th/12th/ITI/Polytechnic Diploma certificates and mark sheets

    • Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor Certificate issued by UIDAI‑authorized Testing & Certifying Agency

    • Any other documents required as per notification

  • Preview the uploaded documents and confirm that they are clear and readable.

Application Fee Payment (If Applicable)

  • Check the Application Fee section in the official notification.

  • If any fee is prescribed, pay it online through available modes such as Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

  • After successful payment, download/print the fee receipt.

Final Submission

  • Carefully review all the details filled in the application form in the Preview section.

  • If required, make corrections before final submission.

  • Click on Final Submit to complete the application process.

Print Application Form

  • After successful submission, download and take a printout of the final submitted application form for future reference.

  • Keep the Registration ID, Password, and printout safe for further recruitment stages.

Selection Process

The recruitment process will consist of Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Physical Standards Test (PST), Computer Based Test (CBT), Trade/Skill Test, Document Verification (DV) and Medical Examination (DME/RME).

  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET): Qualifying in nature.
    • For Constable (Driver, Motor Mechanic Vehicle, Gardner, Painter, Carpenter, Brass Band, Pipe Band, Cobbler, Tailor & Bugler): Male – 5 Kms race in 24 minutes; Female – 1.6 Kms in 8.30 minutes.
    • For Constable (Cook/Water Carrier, Barber & Hair Dresser, Washer man & Washer women, Safai Karmachari): Male – 1.6 Kms in 10 minutes; Female – 1.6 Kms in 12 minutes.
    • For Pioneer Wing (Mason / Electrician): Male – 1.6 Kms in 09 minutes.
    • Pregnant women candidates will be declared temporarily unfit.
  • Physical Standards Test (PST): Height, Chest (for males only) & Weight (proportionate to height & age).
    • Height: Male – 170 Cms (minimum); Female – 157 Cms (minimum). Relaxations applicable for certain categories (ST, NE States, Gorkhas, etc.).
    • Chest (Male only): Un-expanded – 80 Cms, Minimum expansion – 05 Cms. Relaxations applicable.
    • Candidates failing PST will be eliminated.
  • Computer Based Test (CBT): 100 marks (100 MCQs), duration 02 hours.
    • General Intelligence & Reasoning – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • General Knowledge & General Awareness – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • Elementary Mathematics – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • English/Hindi – 25 Qs / 25 Marks
    • Negative marking of 0.25 marks for each wrong answer.
    • Qualifying marks: UR – 30%, EWS/OBC – 25%, SC/ST & others – 20%.
    • Marks will be normalized. Merit list prepared on CBT marks.
  • Trade/Skill Test: Qualifying in nature (50 marks, minimum 20 marks required). Practical assessment of the applied trade/post.
  • Document Verification (DV): Original documents (Matric certificate, Domicile/PRC, Trade certificates, Caste/EWS/ESM certificates, etc.) will be verified.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME) / Review Medical Examination (RME): As per Uniform Guidelines issued by MHA. Temporary unfitness allowed only for pregnancy. Final selection subject to medical fitness.
  • Final merit list prepared on the basis of marks obtained in CBT (subject to qualifying all stages). Separate merit lists for male/female and each State/UT (All India basis for Pioneer posts).

How to Apply

Application Mode: Online only through CRPF website. No other mode will be accepted.

Steps to Apply:

  1. Visit the official website www.rect.crpf.gov.in.
  2. Click on the link for “Recruitment for the post of Constable (Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer) 2026”.
  3. Register by providing basic details and generate Provisional Registration Number & Password.
  4. Fill the online application form carefully (personal details, educational qualification, trade/post applied, State/UT of domicile, etc.).
  5. Upload scanned copies of recent colour passport size photograph, signature, left thumb impression and handwritten declaration as per specifications.
  6. Pay the application fee online (if applicable) through BHIM, UPI, Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card or CSC Wallet.
  7. Submit the application and take printout of the application form & e-receipt for future reference.
  8. Candidates should bring two coloured printouts of the Admit Card at every stage of examination.

UP Cooperative Bank (UPCISB) Selection Process 2026

  • The selection process consists of an online Preliminary Examination (if required) and a Main Examination conducted by UPCISB.
  • Based on the Preliminary Exam, up to 15 times the number of vacancies will be shortlisted for the Main Exam.
  • On the basis of Main Exam result, up to 3 times the number of posts will be called for interview (where applicable) and up to 5 times the number of posts for proficiency test, wherever prescribed.
  • Both Preliminary and Main examinations will be objective-type online tests with multiple choice questions and negative marking of 1/4 mark for each wrong answer.

How to Apply for UP Cooperative Bank (UPCISB) Recruitment 2026

  • Candidates must apply online only through the official website of U.P. Co-operative Institutional Service Board: https://www.upcisb.upsdc.gov.in.
  • First, complete “New Registration” by entering name, contact details and email ID to generate a registration number and password.
  • Fill in the online application form carefully using the “Save and Next” option, upload scanned photograph, signature, left-hand thumb impression and handwritten declaration as per the prescribed specifications.
  • Pay the application fee through the integrated payment gateway, ensure e-Receipt generation, and take a printout of the final submitted application form and fee receipt for future reference.

UP Cooperative Bank (UPCISB) Salary 2026

  • The notification provides detailed pay scales for each post, such as specific minimum and maximum pay in the respective pay bands for Manager, Junior Manager, Assistant/Cashier, Assistant Manager, Accountant, Junior Engineer, Assistant Engineer and other posts.

  • Pay scales differ institution-wise and post-wise (for example, different pay bands for Junior Manager in different District Co-operative Banks), and all posts are permanent with regular pay as per the respective co-operative institution’s rules.

Important Instructions for Candidates

  • Candidates must thoroughly read and understand all instructions in the advertisement before filling the online application form.
  • The photograph, signature, thumb impression and handwritten declaration must be clear and as per the prescribed size and format, otherwise the application may be rejected.
  • No change is permitted in key details after clicking on “Complete Registration”, so all information (name, father’s name, etc.) must match official certificates.
  • Candidates should keep their registered email ID and mobile number active till completion of the recruitment process for receiving admit card and other communication from UPCISB.
  • Minimum efficiency standard (qualifying marks) and negative marking rules in the exam must be noted carefully, as incorrect answers will attract penalty.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

The 137 Composite Ecological Task Force Battalion (Territorial Army) 39 Gorkha Rifles (TA) has officially announced the Recruitment Rally for Various Posts (Ex-Servicemen & Ex-Women Employees) Recruitment 2026 with 161 openings. The detailed notification was published at official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of within 5 years from retirement (JCO up to 55 years & OR up to 50 years) and hold the required Ex-Servicemen status or minimum 20 years service in MoEF&CC/State Forest Department can attend the recruitment rally from 05 May 2026 to 23 May 2026 (phase-wise). Direct links to download the notification and complete details are shared below.

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 Download Notification PDF

Recruitment Rally for 137 Composite Ecological Task Force Battalion (Territorial Army) 39 Gorkha Rifles is being organised for Ex-Servicemen and Ex-women employees of MoEF&CC and State Forest Department. Eligible candidates volunteering to join are required to report for screening (Physical tests and Interview) at 7 AM as per the given schedule. Document checking, screening and medical test of candidates screened in the rally will be held at the venue. Candidates should thoroughly read the official advertisement to check vacancies, eligibility criteria, physical standards, pay & allowances, selection process and detailed instructions for attending the recruitment rally.

Document Download Link
137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 Official Advertisement View / Download Official Advertisement

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 - Overview

Particulars Details
Organisation 137 Composite Ecological Task Force Battalion (Territorial Army) 39 Gorkha Rifles
Rally Name Recruitment Rally for Ex-Servicemen & Ex-Women Employees
Total Vacancies 161
Posts JCO (GD) (ESM), Sol GD (ESM), Sol Clk (SD) (ESM), Chef Com (ESM), Tailor (ESM), Housekeeper (ESM), Washerman (ESM), Dresser (ESM)
Duration of Enrollment 02 years (extendable by 01 year at a time subject to performance & project continuation)
Age Limit Enrolled within 5 years from date of retirement (JCOs up to 55 years & OR up to 50 years)
Official Website indianarmy.nic.in

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 - Important Dates

Events Important Dates & Location
Recruitment Rally - Phase 1 05 to 08 May 2026 at Bengdubi (WB)
Recruitment Rally - Phase 2 13 to 16 May 2026 at Varanasi (UP)
Recruitment Rally - Phase 3 20 to 23 May 2026 at Dehradun (UK)
Reporting Time for Screening 07:00 AM (all phases)

Post Name No. of Posts
JCO (GD) 07
Soldier GD 143

Chef 02

Housekeeper 03
Washerman 01
Dresser 01
Total 161

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Educational Qualification & Experience (Mandatory):

  • Ex-Servicemen Indian Domicile (Pension holder only) OR Ex-women employees (including premature retiree) of MoEF&CC and State Forest Department with minimum 20 years of service in MoEF&CC/State Forest Department.

Medical Category: SHAPE-1

Character: EXEMPLARY / VERY GOOD

Height:

  • Male: 160 cm (152 cm for Gorkhas, Garhwalis & Assamese)
  • Female: 150 cm

Weight: Minimum 50 Kgs (male) & 42 Kgs (female)

Chest (Male): 82 cm (minimum expansion 05 cm)

Chest (Female): Minimum expansion of 5 cm

Note: Relaxation of 5 cm in height and weight commensurate with reduced height for women of North East and hill areas (Gorkhas, Assamese & Garhwalis) will be given.

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 Pay & Allowances Structure

Particulars Details
Basic Pay Basic pay of the rank and service group in which employed in the unit
Dearness Allowance Admissible as per rules from time to time
Other Allowances Children Education Allowance, Hill Compensatory Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Road Mileage Allowance etc.
Pension, Increment & Gratuity No pension, increment and gratuity admissible for service in CETF Bn (TA). Previous pension remains untouched.

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 Selection Process

The selection for 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 will be based on:

  • Physical Tests: 1 Mile Run, Pull Up, 8’9” Ditch and Zig Zag Balance Beam (for male candidates)
  • Proficiency Test: Trade test for tradesmen & test related to afforestation and nursery management for Ex-women candidates
  • Medical Examination: SHAPE-1 standard
  • Interview: By Board of Officers

Candidates who qualify in physical tests will be called for Proficiency Test, Medical Examination and Interview.

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 Documents Required

Candidates must bring the following original documents along with one set of photocopies at the time of rally:

  • Discharge Book (Original)
  • Pension Payment Order (PPO) (Original)
  • 08 x recent passport size coloured photographs
  • Character Certificate from Village Sarpanch / Police authority
  • Education Certificate
  • Domicile Certificate

Territorial Army Application Form 2026

There is no online application form or application fee for this recruitment rally. Eligible candidates are required to attend the recruitment rally in person as per the schedule mentioned above. The rally is a free service. Candidates must report at the venue at 07:00 AM with all required original documents for screening, physical tests, proficiency test, medical examination and interview.

How to Attend Recruitment Rally for 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles 2026

Eligible candidates must attend the Recruitment Rally as per the phase-wise schedule. The step-by-step process is as follows:

Step 1 - Check Eligibility: Ensure you meet all eligibility criteria including service in MoEF&CC/State Forest Department, age, physical standards and character.

Step 2 - Gather Documents: Collect all mandatory original documents mentioned above.

Step 3 - Report at Venue: Reach the respective rally venue (Bengdubi / Varanasi / Dehradun) at 07:00 AM on the scheduled dates.

Step 4 - Screening & Tests: Undergo document checking, physical tests, proficiency test, medical examination and interview.

Note: No mobiles will be allowed inside the rally site. No messing or accommodation will be provided. The authorities will not be responsible for any accident/injuries during the rally.

Territorial Army 137 CETF Bn (TA) 39 Gorkha Rifles Recruitment Rally 2026 - Important Instructions

  • Recruitment is a free service. Do not pay any bribe to anyone. Beware of touts. Any candidate found to have paid bribe will have his/her selection cancelled.
  • Overwriting/tampering on certificates/documents is not acceptable.
  • Producing fake documents and giving false information will make the individual liable for punishment as per law and lead to termination of service irrespective of number of years of service rendered.
  • No mobiles will be brought to the rally site.
  • The authorities conducting the rally will not be responsible for any accident/injuries sustained to the candidates during recruitment rally.
  • No messing and accommodation will be provided during recruitment rally.
  • Territorial Army is a purely voluntary organisation and essentially a part-time job. No permanent employment is provided or promised.
  • Enrolled personnel will be discharged if found unsuitable by the unit board of officers.

Indo-Tibetan Border Police Force (ITBP), under the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India, has released an official notification for the recruitment of Assistant Commandant (Engineer) posts in 2026. This recruitment offers an excellent opportunity for engineering graduates to join one of India’s premier paramilitary forces.

The online application process will begin from 21 April 2026, and eligible candidates can apply through the official ITBP recruitment website. Interested applicants are advised to read the detailed notification carefully before applying.

Post Name Assistant Commandant (Engineer)
Total Vacancies 06
Job Type Central Government Jobs

Salary Details

Selected candidates will receive a salary under Pay Level-10 (₹56,100 – ₹1,77,500) as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, along with other allowances.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has published the Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Notification 2026 in April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 660 positions (630 for POWERGRID + 30 for CTUIL). Candidates within the age range of 18 to 27 years and holding a Diploma in Engineering / Graduate Degree (BBA/BBM/BBS) / Inter CA/CMA / ITI in relevant disciplines are eligible to apply online at powergrid.in. The application process will be active from 20th April 2026 to 11th May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Power Grid Corporation of India (POWERGRID), a ‘Maharatna’ Public Sector Enterprise under the Ministry of Power, Govt. of India has released the detailed advertisement (CC/01/2026) for Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee and Junior Technician Trainee posts (including vacancies for its subsidiary CTUIL). Candidates can download the official detailed advertisement from the POWERGRID website and check region-wise vacancies, eligibility, fee and application process before applying online.

  • Download POWERGRID Recruitment 2026 Detailed Advertisement PDF (Advt. No. CC/01/2026)

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Recruitment 2026 Overview

Particulars Details
Organisation POWERGRID Corporation of India Limited (Maharatna PSU) & CTUIL (wholly owned subsidiary)

CTUIL: 30

A total of 660 vacancies have been announced (630 for POWERGRID + 30 for CTUIL) on region-wise basis across various Regions/Projects of POWERGRID and CTUIL.

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Eligibility Criteria 2026

  • Nationality: Only Indian Nationals of age 18 years or above are eligible to apply.

Diploma Trainee Posts (DTE / DTC / DTS)

Post Name Educational Qualification
Diploma Trainee (Electrical) - DTE Full Time Regular Three Years Diploma in relevant discipline of engineering - Electrical/ Electrical (Power)/ Electrical and Electronics/ Power Systems Engineering/ Power Engineering (Electrical), from recognized Technical Board/Institute with minimum 70% marks for General/ OBC (NCL)/ EWS Candidates and pass marks for SC/ST/PwBD. Higher technical qualification like B.Tech/BE/M.Tech/ME etc. with or without Diploma is not allowed.
Diploma Trainee (Civil) - DTC Full Time Regular Three Years Diploma in Civil Engineering from recognized Technical Board/Institute with minimum 70% marks for General/ OBC (NCL)/ EWS Candidates and pass marks for SC/ST/PwBD. Higher technical qualification like B.Tech/BE/M.Tech/ME etc. with or without Diploma is not allowed.
Diploma Trainee (Survey) - DTS Full-Time Regular Three Years Diploma in Survey Engineering OR Diploma in Civil Engineering (with survey as a subject) from recognized Technical Board / Institute having minimum 70% marks. Higher technical qualification like B.E./B.Tech etc. with or without Diploma is not allowed.

Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Posts

Post Name Educational Qualification
Junior Officer Trainee (HR) - JOT (HR) Three years full time Graduate Regular Degree - BBA/ BBM/ BBS or equivalent qualification from recognized Institute/ University with not less than 60% marks for General/ EWS/ OBC (NCL) category candidates. Candidates with Post Graduate Degree/Diploma or equivalent higher education qualification shall not be allowed to apply.
Junior Officer Trainee (F&A) - JOT (F&A) Inter CA/ Inter CMA. Candidates with Post Graduate Degree/ Post Graduate Diploma/ CA/ CMA or equivalent higher education qualification shall not be allowed to apply.
Junior Technician Trainee (Survey) - JTT (Survey) Full-Time Regular Two Years ITI (Surveyor) from a recognized Technical Board/ Institute. Higher technical qualification like Diploma/B.E./B.Tech etc. with or without ITI is not allowed.

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Age Limit 2026

  • All Posts - 27 Years (Upper Age Limit as on 11-05-2026)
Category Age Limit
Minimum Age 18 years
Maximum Age (General) 27 years
OBC (NCL) 3 years relaxation
SC / ST 5 years relaxation
PwBD (UR/EWS) 10 years relaxation
PwBD (OBC-NCL) 13 years relaxation
PwBD (SC/ST) 15 years relaxation
Ex-Servicemen As per Govt. of India directives (period of service + 3 years, subject to conditions)

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Application Fee 2026

  • For General / OBC (NCL) / EWS: ₹300/- (for DTE/DTC/DTS/JOT posts) or ₹200/- (for JTT Survey post)
  • For  SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen: No fee (exempted)

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Selection Process 2026

  • Written Test / Computer Based Test (CBT) - 100% weightage (170 objective questions: 120 Technical/Professional Knowledge + 50 Aptitude)
  • Computer Skill Test (CST) (for JOT HR / F&A) - Qualifying in nature
  • Trade Test (TT) (for JTT Survey) - Qualifying in nature

Pre-Employment Medical Examination

  • CBT Qualifying Criteria: Minimum 40% aggregate (UR/EWS) / 30% aggregate (reserved) with separate minimum in each part (for Diploma / JOT posts). For JTT: 40% (UR/EWS) / 30% (reserved).

    Final merit is based on CBT marks only (CST / Trade Test is only qualifying).

POWERGRID Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 Documents Required

Candidates must upload the following documents while applying online (and produce originals at Document Verification):

  • Recent passport size colour photograph & signature
  • Date of Birth proof (Matric / Birth Certificate)
  • Qualification Certificates & all Mark Sheets (with CGPA to % conversion proof if applicable)
  • No Objection Certificate (for Govt./PSU employees)
  • Caste / EWS / PwBD Certificate (if applicable) in GOI format
  • Scribe-related certificates (if applicable)
  • Ex-Servicemen certificates / Discharge Certificate (if applicable)
  • Domicile cum Age relaxation certificate for Riot Victims (if applicable)

How to Apply for POWERGRID Recruitment 2026

  • Candidates must apply online only through https://www.powergrid.in → Career Section.
  • Upload recent passport size photograph (50 KB), signature (50 KB) and all required documents in prescribed format.
  • Pay application fee online (if applicable) through Payment Gateway.
  • Candidates can edit/update application till the last date. No changes allowed after closing.
  • Take printout of the submitted online application for future reference.
  • Last date for submission of online application is 11 May 2026 (23:59 Hours).

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Online Application Form

Eligible candidates who wish to apply for the POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee and Junior Technician Trainee posts can do so by submitting their application form online through the official POWERGRID website. The application process for the POWERGRID Recruitment 2026 is completely online, and candidates must ensure that they complete all steps before the deadline.

The online application process for the POWERGRID Non-Executive Recruitment 2026 will begin on 20 April 2026 at 5:00 PM through the POWERGRID career portal. Eligible candidates are encouraged to fill out the application form and upload the required documents including recent passport-sized photograph and signature in prescribed format.

Click Here to Apply Online for POWERGRID Non Executive Recruitment 2026

POWERGRID Diploma Trainee, Junior Officer Trainee & Junior Technician Trainee Remuneration 2026

Selected candidates shall undergo training for a period of one year. Pay during training & on successful completion of training is as given below.

Pay Component Details
Diploma Trainee / Junior Officer Trainee (during training - 1 year) Pay scale Rs.24000-3%-108000/- (IDA) at S0 level with Basic Pay Rs.24,000/- + IDA, HRA and Perks @12% of Basic Pay
On absorption (after training) Junior Engineer Gr-IV / Junior Officer Gr-IV at S1 level in pay scale Rs.25000-3%-117500/- (IDA) with annual CTC approx. Rs.12.7 Lakhs
Junior Technician Trainee (Survey) (during training - 1 year) Pay scale Rs.21000-3%-72000/- (IDA) at W2 level with Basic Pay Rs.21,000/- + IDA, HRA and Perks @12% of Basic Pay
On absorption (after training) Junior Technician at W3 level in pay scale Rs.21500-3%-74000/- (IDA) with annual CTC approx. Rs.10.9 Lakhs
Additional Benefits (on regularization) Dearness Allowance, Perquisites & Allowance as per cafeteria approach, Performance Related Pay, Company Quarters or HRA, Reimbursement of conveyance, mobile, laptop, PF, Gratuity, Pension, Leave encashment, Group Insurance, Medical facilities, Loans & Advances etc. as per company rules

Important Instructions for Candidates

  • Read the detailed advertisement carefully before filling the online application.
  • Upload legible copies of all required documents (photograph, signature, qualification certificates, caste/PwBD certificate etc.) in the prescribed size and format.
  • Candidates working in Govt./PSU must upload NOC or undertaking at the time of application.
  • Keep registered mobile number and email active till completion of the recruitment process.
  • Application fee once paid will not be refunded.
  • POWERGRID reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process without assigning any reason.
  • Region-specific vacancies; no inter-region transfer request allowed after joining.

How to Apply for Sarkari Job Online 2026

  1. Find the right Sarkari Job: Use the vacancy table or sector links above on OnlyJobs. Filter by your qualification — 10th, 12th, Graduate, or Engineering. Check the last date and eligibility carefully.

  2. Read the official notification: Click on the job listing to open the official notification PDF. Read all eligibility conditions — age limit, educational qualification, experience, category relaxations.

  3. Visit the official recruitment website: Never apply through third-party sites. Use the direct official link provided on OnlyJobs. Look for "Apply Online" or "Register" on the official portal.

  4. Register / Create account: Sign up using your valid email ID and active mobile number. Keep your Aadhaar, bank account details, and email accessible.

  5. Fill the application form: Enter personal details, educational qualifications, category (General/OBC/SC/ST/EWS), address, and other required information accurately.

  6. Upload documents: Scan and upload recent passport-size photograph, signature, 10th certificate (for DOB proof), educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable). Check file size and format (JPG/PDF as specified).

  7. Pay application fee: Pay via Net Banking, UPI, Debit/Credit Card as applicable. Some categories (SC/ST/PwD/Women) may be exempted from fee. Keep the payment receipt.

  8. Submit and save confirmation: Review all details before final submission. After submitting, download the application printout / PDF confirmation with your registration number. Store it safely for admit card, exam, and future reference.

Why Sarkari Job? Benefits of Government Employment in India

Job Security
Permanent employment — cannot be terminated without due process. Lifelong career stability.
7th Pay Commission Salary
Fixed salary + DA, HRA, TA allowances. DA revised every 6 months. Regular pay revisions.
Medical Benefits
Free or subsidised medical treatment for employee and family under CGHS / state health schemes.
Housing Benefits
Government quarters (where available) or HRA (8–27% of basic pay). No private rent worries.
Pension (NPS / OPS)
Post-retirement monthly pension under NPS or OPS (state-specific). Financial security after service.
Work-Life Balance
Fixed working hours. Paid casual, medical, earned leave. National and state holidays. No overtime culture.
Career Growth
Regular promotions through DPC, ACR-based upgrades, MACP benefits (3 financial upgrades guaranteed).
Children's Education Allowance
Reimbursement of children's school fees (₹2,812/month per child up to 2 children, revised periodically).

Frequently Asked Questions – Sarkari Job 2026

What is Sarkari Job (सरकारी नौकरी)?

Sarkari Job (सरकारी नौकरी) refers to government employment in India — jobs offered by central government departments, state governments, public sector undertakings (PSUs), banks, railways, defence forces, and other government-funded organisations. These jobs offer permanent employment, fixed salary as per 7th Pay Commission, pension, medical benefits, and unmatched job security.

How to find Sarkari Job vacancy 2026 online?

To find online Sarkari Job vacancies in 2026: (1) Visit OnlyJobs daily for updated notifications. (2) Filter by your qualification — 10th, 12th, Graduate, PG. (3) Filter by sector — Railway, Banking, SSC, Defence, State PSC, Teaching. (4) Check last dates carefully. (5) Apply through the official department website using the direct link provided. Enable push notifications on OnlyJobs for instant alerts.

What Sarkari Job can I get after 10th pass?

After 10th pass, you can apply for: Railway Group D (RRB), Indian Army Soldier posts, Postal Mail Guard, SSC MTS / Havaldar, Constable GD, Anganwadi Worker/Helper, ITI Apprentice in PSUs (IOCL, HPCL, NTPC), MCL / Coal India posts, and various state government peon/chowkidar posts. Thousands of 10th pass Sarkari Job vacancies open every year.

What is the salary in Sarkari Job 2026?

Sarkari Job salary in 2026 follows the 7th Pay Commission: Group D / MTS: ₹22,000–₹26,000/month. Clerk / Group C: ₹32,000–₹48,000/month. Officer Grade (SSC CGL, Bank PO): ₹47,000–₹85,000/month. IAS/IPS (UPSC): ₹56,100–₹1,44,200 basic pay + DA, HRA, TA, medical and other allowances. State government salaries vary by state pay commission.

Which Bharat Sarkari Job has the most vacancies in 2026?

The largest Bharat Sarkari Job recruitments in 2026 include: Indian Army Agniveer (40,000+ posts), RRB Group D (22,000+ posts), SSC CGL (14,582 posts), SSC MTS (10,000+ posts), UP Police Constable (multiple), Bihar Police (multiple), IBPS Clerk (8,000+ posts), and various state PSC recruitments. Total active sarkari vacancies in India exceed 52,920 as of March 2026.

What is the best website to find Sarkari Job in India?

OnlyJobs is India's most trusted portal for Sarkari Job notifications since 2011, serving over 10 million users. Official direct sources include: ssc.nic.in (SSC), indianrailways.gov.in (Railways), upsc.gov.in (UPSC), ibps.in (Banking), and respective state PSC websites. OnlyJobs aggregates all official notifications in one place with direct apply links.

How to apply for Sarkari Job online in 2026?

To apply for Sarkari Job online: (1) Read official notification PDF. (2) Check eligibility. (3) Visit official recruitment website. (4) Register with email/mobile. (5) Fill application form. (6) Upload photo, signature, and certificates. (7) Pay fee via Net Banking/UPI/Debit card. (8) Submit and lication confirmation. Save the registration number for admit card and future reference.

What are the benefits of Sarkari Job in India?

Key benefits: (1) Lifelong job security. (2) 7th Pay Commission salary + DA revised biannually. (3) HRA (8–27% of basic). (4) Medical benefits (CGHS). (5) Pension under NPS/OPS. (6) Paid leave — casual, earned, medical. (7) Gratuity after 5 years. (8) Children's education allowance. (9) Fixed working hours and work-life balance. (10) Prestige and social recognition in Indian society.

What is the age limit for Sarkari Job?

Age limits vary by post: Group D (18–25 years), SSC CGL (18–32 years), Bank PO (20–30 years), UPSC Civil Services (21–32 years), Defence Agniveer (17.5–23 years). Age relaxations: SC/ST — 5 years, OBC — 3 years, PwD — 10 years, Ex-Servicemen — 3 years (general), Government servants — up to 5 years. Always verify in the official notification for each post.

What is Bharat Sarkari Job?

Bharat Sarkari Job means government job opportunities across the entire country of India (Bharat) — spanning central and state government vacancies across all 28 states and 8 union territories. The term emphasises pan-India coverage. OnlyJobs covers all Bharat Sarkari Job notifications from UPSC, SSC, Railways, Banking, Defence, state PSCs, and all other government departments.

About OnlyJobs 2026

OnlyJobs (Government Jobs) are highly sought-after employment opportunities in India. These positions offer job security, good salary packages, allowances, and retirement benefits. Our platform provides comprehensive information about all types of government vacancies including:

  • Central Government Jobs: UPSC, SSC, Railway, Banking, Defence, PSUs

Frequently Asked Questions - OnlyJobs 2026

Q1: What is the eligibility for OnlyJobs?

Eligibility varies by position. Generally, candidates need to be Indian citizens aged 18-35 years (with age relaxation for reserved categories). Educational qualifications range from 10th pass to post-graduation depending on the job.

Q2: How to prepare for Government Job exams?

Preparation includes understanding the exam pattern, studying from standard books, practicing previous year papers, taking mock tests, and staying updated with current affairs. Focus on subjects like General Knowledge, Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, and English.

Q3: Which are the best Government Jobs in 2026?

Top government jobs include IAS/IPS (UPSC), Bank PO, SSC CGL, Railway Group A & B, Defence Services, PSU Jobs, State PCS, and Teaching positions. These offer excellent career growth, job security, and benefits.

Q4: What is the application process for OnlyJobs?

The process typically involves: 1) Online registration on the official website, 2) Filling application form, 3) Uploading documents (photo, signature, certificates), 4) Payment of application fee, 5) Downloading admit card, 6) Appearing for examination, 7) Document verification if selected.

Q5: How often are new OnlyJobs notifications released?

New government job notifications are released daily. Major recruitments like UPSC, SSC, IBPS have annual calendars, while state governments and PSUs release notifications throughout the year. We update our portal daily with 739+ active job listings.

Anganwadi Worker Salary / Honorarium 2026

Anganwadi Workers and Helpers receive a monthly honorarium (not a salary), which includes a Central Government component and an additional State Government component. The table below shows the total honorarium per month for key states in 2026.
